# Market Pulse — 2026-03-02

## 板块结论 | Sector Conclusions
### Energy & Defense Hedge $CVX $LMT
- **结论**：伊朗冲突与黎巴嫩火线让原油风险溢价走高，同时美国国防补单预期升温。
- **News**：[USA Today](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxQeXQ4Rk91Rk9nclBPdVcyTkRsV1lUdi0tcTEzaHVnYmVaZVpueHRHakhnSWJPOVVLWi01clJaeVdSeDhWZzBBM29GaGRNUEFnbHJrSWJGR0xwOVlhTkZzdHdhckRXMDQyUGE4dmxyTHhwSkk1Rjk3VXpPbDA3d1kwcXBfRkxSYUpydnJUa0R0MlFqZ3hyellpTTRtNWRLR1J4Rk4zbG9LRDg3ZnowS3c?oc=5)
- **Creator Clip**：[Hedgeye 朝闻](https://www.youtube.com/@hedgeye)
- **相关股票**：$CVX（维持 15%）、$LMT（维持 15% 并关注补单触发加仓）

### AI Infrastructure Stack $NVDA $MSFT $GOOGL
- **结论**：GTC 前夕，AI 供应链和云厂商继续上调 capex，NVDA/MSFT/GOOGL 维持核心仓位。
- **News**：[GuruFocus](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiqAFBVV95cUxNaE5yaGZYM2xDbHRUbGd2eWR3SmNmdWdpTGJWMS1HT21CZVdyZGtoTWJHQWdMbHBzLVNxbmZ6OC1tUnJxT3NYSDRmeWRqSkFuZlBFUlBHZDRWcDlPejRuSUoyNHVlRGpURGwyWllvT2h6U1ZtQWpzeEUzTE5ITG9xa0h6M1BvRDQtbjVobTNqQU51XzQyb0pVX28tQlZzZHhBdHN3WEhpaTU?oc=5)
- **Creator Clip**：[Bloomberg GTC Preview](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=UCIALMKvObZNtJ6AmdCLP7Lg)
- **相关股票**：$NVDA（目标 12%）、$MSFT（10%）、$GOOGL（8%）

### Consumer Resilience / Income Barbell $COST $SCHD
- **结论**：通胀反复下，会员制零售与高股息 ETF 仍是组合底仓。
- **News**：[Yahoo Finance](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- **Creator Clip**：[Graham Stephan 消费信心](https://www.youtube.com/@GrahamStephan)
- **相关股票**：$COST（8%）、$SCHD（7%）

### High Beta / Optionality $TSLA $SOUN + Hedge
- **结论**：保留小仓高弹性票捕捉情绪反弹，并用 VIX Call 做尾部保护。
- **News**：[Meyka](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxOY2IwRlV6WGZJcnItYTNMSVhLUklpc3BTbE1oZTlLOG92WUVSSzVaT183Wkc1UDhwV3VtbWlzOURYNWhlTTluZDVkRnBKUzZ1REhlWFpOS1ZSQzhlVmpMYTc4X0xqZFB1UzNKSU9DcWlrWlBUbzBVejMzMGZHODRNNXVCSFNTbExvWnVnT2xGNU8zaVptcVBzcUxFa19naG01TGlESmp1bzdxYjFYdGpMNUVmbw?oc=5)
- **Creator Clip**：[TradingKey 美股财经](https://www.youtube.com/@TradingKey_ZH)
- **相关股票**：$TSLA（4%）、$SOUN（4%）、VIX 30d Call（名义 $2k）

## Macro Wire
- **CBS News** · What are today's mortgage interest rates: March 2, 2026? — 全美房贷利率再度攀升，反映地缘冲突的溢价。 (https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMifkFVX3lxTE5FbDR1a3JzOWZYMExGd0dWV21Za3pzZFg0TjY4ejd2YXNKYkRRdHhJUGxvZFRLdDhDS25PVWhTbXRPZ0FKazAzQzNkdkpFeDBZa3hhRWo1bzhfdXVvYXdQUUFVbGk3WEtybHNJc0c2ZW1hWlB2ck9oMEE4MEloUQ?oc=5)
- **Yahoo Finance** · Mortgage rates jump back above 6% as Iran strikes stoke fresh inflation fears — 地缘局势推升通胀担忧，抵押贷款利率回到 6% 上方。 (https://news.google.?oc=5)
- **USA Today** · What war with Iran means for prices, interest rates, supply chains — 列举战争情景对价格与供应链的冲击。 (https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMirgFBVV95cUxQeXQ4Rk91Rk9nclBPdVcyTkRsV1lUdi0tcTEzaHVnYmVaZVpueHRHakhnSWJPOVVLWi01clJaeVdSeDhWZzBBM29GaGRNUEFnbHJrSWJGR0xwOVlhTkZzdHdhckRXMDQyUGE4dmxyTHhwSkk1Rjk3VXpPbDA3d1kwcXBfRkxSYUpydnJUa0R0MlFqZ3hyellpTTRtNWRLR1J4Rk4zbG9LRDg3ZnowS3c?oc=5)

- **Bloomberg** · Global Bonds on Knife-Edge as Iran War Revives Inflation Threat — 全球债市对战争引发的通胀威胁高度敏感。 (https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxQN25pMnR1YzNZOUNUSzFzWndCUHZBUV9ERnR4R0lxcDEtUk10ak4tUlNVTEg5ZnkxM09JZDhMZWllNlBxT09ZT2JEUlVHZWRMOVlLTGdwTVdQX2hWZjFoZ2dueXF4RFVHOFRRNGJId0NYNU9fanNhQTFlS2VyYWwwMnZhVGVncTV1eThDVFlnR1B0TFlZQTR3cU5WTjB3dEVyVW1DVHlORFQ3akEwSzNRZTBLV2M?oc=5)

## Trade & Positioning Ideas
- **Energy & Defense Hedge**：CVX / LMT 分别维持 15%，油价 < $188 或国防补单回调时再加仓。
- **AI Infrastructure**：NVDA 12%（突破 $190 以上用期权保护），MSFT 10%，GOOGL 8%。
- **Consumer Barbell**：COST 8%、SCHD 7%，逢回调补齐。
- **Optionality**：TSLA 4%、SOUN 4%，VIX 30d Call 名义 $2k。
